scripts.check: biome check --write --error-on-warnings . && npm run check:types && npm run check:purity
scripts.check:types: tsc -p packages/kernel/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/kernel/tsconfig.test.json && tsc -p packages/host-node/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json && tsc -p examples/tsconfig.json
